description: Ground truth for PhysInt benchmark. joint.violated=true means the limit is physically implausible. mass.mass_kg is computed analytically from exact primitive geometry × material density.

scenes.name: bench_revolute_limits
scenes.description: Robot arm chain — tests revolute joint violation detection

scenes.name: bench_mass_materials
scenes.description: 4 materials with known masses — tests mass estimation accuracy

scenes.name: bench_mixed
scenes.description: Combined — 3 prims + 3 revolute joints (1 violated)

scenes.name: bench_prismatic_limits
scenes.description: Linear actuator — tests prismatic (slider) joint violation detection

scenes.name: bench_humanoid_arm
scenes.description: 6-DOF humanoid arm — ShoulderAbduct and WristSupination violated

scenes.name: bench_all_valid
scenes.description: 5 revolute joints all within normal limits — specificity test (expect 0 violations)

scenes.name: bench_crane
scenes.description: Tower crane — JibSwing revolute and HookTravel prismatic violated

scenes.name: bench_symmetric_violation
scenes.description: WideSwing ±200° (400° total range) — symmetric impossible limit

scenes.name: bench_scara
scenes.description: SCARA robot — Joint2 elbow revolute and ZTravel prismatic violated

scenes.name: bench_gripper
scenes.description: Parallel jaw gripper — Spread joints exceed palm width; Close joints valid

scenes.name: bench_excavator
scenes.description: Excavator arm — hydraulic cylinders over-stroke (prismatic violated)

scenes.name: bench_wrist_3dof
scenes.description: 3-DOF wrist — Roll exceeds 360°; ToolGrip prismatic over-travels

scenes.name: bench_linear_gantry
scenes.description: Cartesian gantry — X_Axis and Z_Axis prismatic exceed beam dimensions

scenes.name: bench_all_violated
scenes.description: All 4 revolute joints violated — maximum recall stress test
